_comment: Published stock hashrate specs for Mining Guardian hashrate evaluation. Sources: Bitmain support, Auradine docs, Bitdeer official. All values are manufacturer-rated at stock firmware. BiXBiT firmware overrides these via active profile. Tolerances are ±3% per manufacturer spec.

_evaluation_tiers.tier_1: BiXBiT firmware — compare against currentProfile parsed TH/s (live from AMS miner_config)
_evaluation_tiers.tier_2: Stock firmware with known model — compare against rated_ths from this file
_evaluation_tiers.tier_3: Unknown model or unlisted — use 3-5 day running average baseline (miner_baselines table)

antminer-s19jpro.notes: Most common variant in fleet is 104T. AMS model code: antminer-s19jpro

antminer-s19j-pro.notes: Alternate AMS model code for same hardware. AMS model code: antminer-s19j-pro

antminer-s21-imm.notes: Two immersion variants exist. 215T is more common at standard settings, 301T is high-energy mode. AMS model code: antminer-s21-imm

antminer-s21e-xp-hydro.notes: 2U hydro-cooled. Profiles follow '{TH/s} TH/s - ~{W} W' format on BiXBiT firmware — parseable. Stock rated at 440T. AMS model code: antminer-s21e-xp-hydro

teraflux-ah3880.notes: Mode-based not profile-based. 'turbo'=600 TH/s (manual mapping required). 'normal' and 'eco' are estimates. Exact watts depend on mode. AMS model code: teraflux-ah3880. Auradine firmware uses mode API not overclock profiles.

sealminer-a2.notes: SEAL02 chip, 4nm process. Three power modes. Default/normal mode is 226 TH/s. AMS model code: sealminer-a2

baseline_config._comment: Settings for Tier 3 running-average baseline system
baseline_config.also_applies_when: model not in miner_specs or rated_ths is null
